chunks.title: Accession and Early Reign
chunks.reason: Introduces Uzziah's age, lineage, and initial faithfulness.

chunks.title: Military Successes and Fortifications
chunks.reason: Details Uzziah's conquests, economic growth, and military preparations.

chunks.title: Pride and Leprosy
chunks.reason: Narrates Uzziah's pride, the priestly confrontation, and his subsequent disease.

chunks.title: Death and Succession
chunks.reason: Concludes with the record of his acts, death, burial, and Jotham's succession.
